title: Truffle Bhuna Keto
description: A floral and juicy Malaysian dish featuring truffle oil in a spicy bhuna sauce with a touch of keto-friendly vegetables for those looking to indulge without guilt.

ingredients.name: Coconut milk
ingredients.notes: low fat or full-fat, as per preference

instructions: Prepare the chicken by lightly salting and seasoning both sides. Heat a pan with some coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan, sautéing until translucent. Add the green chilies and cook for another minute.
Pour in the tomato sauce and add turmeric powder. Let it simmer for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Place the chicken breast in the sauce, ensuring each piece is fully coated with the sauce mixture. Cover and reduce heat to low for about 10 minutes on each side.
While the chicken is cooking, stir fry sesame seeds until lightly browned in a different pan, set aside.
After the chicken finishes cooking, mix in the chopped fresh thyme leaves and the truffle oil. Serve with toasted sesame seeds as garnish.
If you prefer your dish spicier, add more green chilies or adjust the amount of turmeric powder for desired flavor profile.
